data.title: Copper traders turn to high-risk rerouting paths to ship between U.S. and China
data.description:

The use of third-country stops shows how far firms are going to keep shipments moving as tensions between Washington and Beijing disrupt normal routes. Scrap from the United […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/copper-trade-rerouting-u-s-china/

data.title: BNB Chain's Q2 2025 Growth Highlights Record User Activity and Transactions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the latest report from Messari on BNB Chain for Q2 2025 reveals continued robust growth, with user activity and on-chain transactions reaching new highs. Daily active addresses and transaction volumes saw significant increases, while DeFi activity remained strong. BNB Chain led in DEX trading volume and stablecoin transactions, reinforcing its position as a leader in the Web3 ecosystem.

Key highlights include a 7.5% increase in BNB's market capitalization, reaching $92.6 billion, reflecting investor confidence. On-chain transactions surged by 101.9% to an average of 9.9 million daily, and daily active addresses grew by 33.2% to 1.6 million, with 17 million new addresses added in May.

In the DEX sector, BNB Chain maintained the highest trading volume across all chains, with a Q2 daily average of $3.3 billion. PancakeSwap held an 85.1% market share, while Uniswap's volume increased by 755.4% to $297 million. Network fees decreased by 90% to 0.1 gwei.

Stablecoins saw a market cap increase of 49.6% to $10.5 billion, with USD1 debuting at $2.2 billion. USDT dominated with a market cap of $6.3 billion. BNB Chain led in stablecoin transaction numbers and active users.

DeFi's total value locked (TVL) rose by 14% to $9.9 billion, securing the fourth position overall. Technical upgrades included the Lorentz and Maxwell hard forks, reducing block time to 0.75 seconds. The opBNB and Volta upgrades increased cross-chain TVL to $64.9 million, with Volta achieving sub-second finality by reducing block intervals to 500 milliseconds.

Ecosystem support was evident with the ninth season of MVB backing 16 early-stage projects. Additionally, a stablecoin zero-fee carnival subsidized $4 million in gas fees to accelerate user adoption.

data.title: Philippine bill charts path to strategic reserve with 10,000 Bitcoin
data.description:
The bill would require the central bank to buy 2,000 Bitcoin annually over five years and hold the assets for at least two decades.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/philippine-bill-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-10000-btc?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Seoul Court Orders Wemade to Compensate Employees in Lawsuit
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Seoul Central District Court has partially ruled in favor of current and former employees of Wemade in a compensation lawsuit against the company. The court has ordered Wemade to pay a total of 9.93928 billion Korean won (approximately 7.14 million USD) to the plaintiffs.

In July of last year, 27 current and former executives and employees of Wemade filed a lawsuit seeking compensation of 16.17648 billion Korean won. Among the plaintiffs, a former employee of Wemade's subsidiary, Wemade Tree, claimed that the company had promised payments that were not fulfilled, prompting the legal action.

data.title: US bond market stuck, but dollar traders bet Powell won’t blink at Jackson Hole
data.description:
The US bond market stayed frozen Friday morning, as the 10-year Treasury yield didn’t move at all, stuck at 4. 332%, while the 2-year nudged up by less than one basis point to 3. 8%. But hey, that’s nothing. Wall Street wasn’t watching yields anyway. All eyes were locked on Jerome Powell’s upcoming speech at Jackson Hole, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bonds-stuck-dollar-bet-powell-wont-blink/

data.title: Bitcoin’s Reign Will Continue, Popular American Entrepreneur Says
data.description:
According to Anthony Pompliano, Bitcoin is still the clear leader in the crypto market and it’s not likely to give up that spot soon. He made the point during an appearance on CNBC’s Squawk Box, where he pushed back against the old “blockchain, not Bitcoin” line that was popular in the 2016-2017 cycle. Related Reading: Panic Or Profit? Analyst Says XRP Below $3 Is A ‘Massive Blessing’ He said Bitcoin has proven itself, and he framed the debate as one about what people want to own, not just what the technology can do. Bitcoin Maintains Market Lead Pompliano argued that the idea blockchain alone would outshine Bitcoin has been tested and found wanting
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoins-reign-will-continue-popular-american-entrepreneur-says/
